prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-FINEPOINT-TWEEZERS-2PK-PZ-AMZ Product Type: TWEEZER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 2pk Stainless Steel Fine Point Precision Tweezers Craft Supplies, 4.5 Inches Description: An essential craft and hobby tool, ToolTreaux’s precision tweezers feature an extra super fine point tip for all your creative projects that require accurate detail work. Whether it’s decoupage, scrapbooking, jewelry making, electronics repair, model building or other adult hobby kits, these precision tweezers will help to get the job done.

Weighing in at just 0.03lbs, these precision tweezers are incredibly lightweight, making them easy and ergonomically comfortable to handle. Stainless steel tweezers for crafting are easy to grip and feature ideal tension for optimal comfort and control.

Made from quality stainless steel, ToolTreaux’s fine point precision crafting tweezers will stand the test of time, are corrosion resistant, non magnetic and will stand up to all the unique and creative projects on your list.

Add these to your collection of hobby tools and let the projects begin.

Ships as a pack of two (2) units. Search Terms: tweezer set precision hobbytool set stainless steel jewelry basic gem diamond inspection identification hobbyist stone watch making fine jewelry eye loupe rock hounding facial hair removal beauty fine point Features: - CRAFT SUPPLIES: Extra fine point precision tweezers are ideal for creative projects that require fine detail work like decoupage, scrapbooking, jewelry making, model building, electronics repair and much more! - PRECISION TWEEZERS: Weighing in at just 0.03lbs, these precision tweezers are incredibly lightweight, making them easy and ergonomically comfortable to handle; the extremely narrow fine point tip make for accurate and precise work - COMFORTABLE TENSION CONTROL: Stainless steel tweezers for crafting are easy to grip and features ideal tension for optimal comfort and control when taking on your latest project - STAINLESS STEEL: Quality material construction means these super fine point precision tweezers will stand the test of time and many creative projects to come; corrosion resistant - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 x 0.5 x 0.5 inches; Weight: 0.10lbs; Color: Silver; Ships as a pack of (2) two === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 2pk 4.5in Silver Fine Point Precision Tweezers

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 2-pk 4.5 in Silver Fine Point Precision Tweezers

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-Pack, Stainless Steel, Extra Fine Point, Lightweight, Craft And Jewelry Making, Corrosion Resistant

openai.title_differentiation: Extra Fine Point Tip, Lightweight Control, Stainless Steel, Corrosion Resistant, Ideal Tension, Pack Of 2
